glosses.ja: 満足している; 幸せな

sentences.target: Estoy contento hoy con mi café.

translations.es: Estoy contento hoy con mi café.
translations.en: I'm happy today with my coffee.
translations.fr: Je suis content aujourd'hui avec mon café.
translations.de: Ich bin heute mit meinem Kaffee zufrieden.
translations.it: Oggi sono contento del mio caffè.
translations.ko: 나는 오늘 내 커피가 좋아서 행복하다.
translations.zh-Hans: 我今天喝着咖啡很开心。
translations.pt: Estou contente hoje com o meu café.
translations.he: אני שמח היום עם הקפה שלי.
translations.vi: Hôm nay tôi vui với cà phê của mình.
translations.nl: Ik ben vandaag blij met mijn koffie.
translations.hi: मैं आज अपनी कॉफी से खुश हूँ।
translations.pl: Jestem dziś zadowolony z mojej kawy.
translations.el: Είμαι χαρούμενος σήμερα με τον καφέ μου.
translations.nb: Jeg er glad i dag med kaffen min.
translations.id: Saya senang hari ini dengan kopi saya.
translations.sv: Jag är glad i dag med mitt kaffe.
translations.ro: Sunt fericit astăzi cu cafeaua mea.
translations.cs: Dnes jsem spokojený se svým kávou.
translations.da: Jeg er glad i dag med min kaffe.
translations.ja: 今日はコーヒーでうれしいです.

tokens.explanation: Finite first-person singular present form of the auxiliary/ copular verb 'estar', used to form a predicative construction.
Adjective functioning as a subject complement; masculine singular form agreeing with the implicit first-person singular subject.
Adverb of time modifying the whole predication, indicating the time reference.
Preposition introducing a prepositional phrase.
Possessive determiner modifying the noun that follows; invariable form.
Common noun serving as the object of the preposition 'con'.

sentences.target: Mi hermana está contenta en casa.

translations.es: Mi hermana está contenta en casa.
translations.en: My sister is happy at home.
translations.fr: Ma sœur est contente à la maison.
translations.de: Meine Schwester ist zu Hause zufrieden.
translations.it: Mia sorella è contenta a casa.
translations.pt: Minha irmã está contente em casa.
translations.vi: Chị tôi vui vẻ ở nhà.
translations.hi: मेरी बहन घर पर खुश है।
translations.pl: Moja siostra jest zadowolona w domu.
translations.el: Η αδελφή μου είναι χαρούμενη στο σπίτι.
translations.id: Adik perempuan saya senang di rumah.
translations.ja: 妹は家でうれしいです。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner modifying the noun 'hermana'.
Common noun; head of the subject noun phrase.
Third-person singular present form of the auxiliary/coplan verb 'estar', linking the subject to the predicate adjective.
Adjective functioning as a subject complement; feminine singular form agreeing with 'hermana'.
Preposition introducing a locative phrase.
Common noun in a locative prepositional phrase; here understood as 'at home'/'in the house'.

translations.fr: Nous sommes contents après le match.
translations.de: Wir sind nach dem Spiel zufrieden.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi vui sau trận đấu.
translations.nl: We zijn blij na de wedstrijd.
translations.hi: हम मैच के बाद खुश हैं।
translations.ja: 試合のあと、私たちはうれしいです。

tokens.explanation: First-person plural present form of the auxiliary/coplan verb 'estar'.
Adjective functioning as a subject complement; masculine plural form agreeing with the first-person plural subject.
Adverb of time used here to introduce a temporal relation with the following prepositional phrase.
Contraction of the preposition 'de' with the definite article 'el'.
Common noun forming the object of the preposition/contraction; refers to the event after which the state holds.

sentences.target: Ella parece contenta con su regalo.

translations.es: Ella parece contenta con su regalo.
translations.en: She looks happy with her gift.
translations.fr: Elle a l'air contente de son cadeau.
translations.de: Sie sieht mit ihrem Geschenk zufrieden aus.
translations.zh-Hans: 她看起来对自己的礼物很开心。
translations.yue: 佢睇落對自己份禮物好開心。
translations.pt: Ela parece contente com o presente.
translations.he: היא נראית שמחה עם המתנה שלה.
translations.vi: Cô ấy có vẻ vui với món quà của mình.
translations.nl: Ze lijkt blij met haar cadeau.
translations.hi: वह अपने उपहार से खुश लगती है।
translations.pl: Wygląda na zadowoloną ze swojego prezentu.
translations.el: Φαίνεται χαρούμενη με το δώρο της.
translations.nb: Hun ser glad ut med gaven sin.
translations.sv: Hon ser glad ut med sin present.
translations.da: Hun ser glad ud med sin gave.
translations.ja: 彼女はプレゼントをもらってうれしそうです。

tokens.explanation: Third-person feminine singular personal pronoun functioning as the subject.
Third-person singular present form of the verb 'parecer', expressing appearance or seeming.
Adjective serving as a predicate complement, feminine singular agreeing with 'ella'.
Preposition introducing a prepositional phrase.
Possessive determiner modifying the noun that follows; invariable for person/number and agreeing contextually.
Common noun serving as the object of the preposition 'con'.

My sister is happy at home.
She looks happy with her gift.
